summary: Comprehensive testing of RBAC Permission Module. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Fixed critical bug: Login history was not being recorded - added login_history collection recording for both successful and failed login attempts.

bugs_fixed.description: The /api/rbac/login-history endpoint was querying login_history collection but login events were only stored in user_sessions. Added login history recording for both successful and failed login attempts.

passed_tests: GET /api/rbac/permission-templates - Get pre-defined and custom templates (5 system templates)
GET /api/rbac/sessions - Get all active user sessions
GET /api/rbac/login-history?status=failed - Get login history with filters
POST /api/rbac/api-keys - Create new API key (returns key only once)
GET /api/rbac/activity-log?action=create - Get activity log with filters
GET /api/rbac/check-permission?target_user_id=xxx - Check permission for other user
Staff access control - Staff correctly denied access to admin-only endpoints
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: All RBAC APIs properly check for admin/superadmin role before allowing access
GOOD: Permission templates include 5 system templates (admin, manager, cashier, accountant, viewer)
GOOD: System templates cannot be deleted (protected with tpl_ prefix check)
GOOD: Role cloning preserves permissions and tracks cloned_from reference
GOOD: API keys use secure generation with secrets.token_hex and SHA256 hashing
GOOD: API key is only shown once at creation time (security best practice)
GOOD: Session management allows revoking individual or all sessions
GOOD: IP whitelist supports both individual IPs and CIDR ranges
GOOD: Time-based access schedules support role-level and user-level restrictions
FIXED: Login history now records both successful and failed login attempts with IP, user-agent, and timestamp
seed_data_creation: Created staff user for access control testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC Permission Module fully tested. 25+ APIs verified including: Permission Templates (CRUD), Role Cloning, Session Management, Login History (with audit trail), IP Whitelisting, Time-Based Access, API Keys Management, Activity Log, Bulk Permission Updates, Permission Check, RBAC Stats. Login history bug was fixed - now records both successful and failed login attempts to login_history collection.

login_history.fix_applied: Added login_history recording for successful and failed logins
